reports.query:
## Wallet Graph

Track pump.fun trader wallets and their off-exchange SOL connections.

- **pump_seed** — confirmed pump.fun trader (seeded from on-chain history)
- **discovered** — counterparty found in direct SOL transfer history outside pump.fun
- Every edge is a SOL *system transfer* that did **not** touch a pump.fun program

> Use **Firefox or Chrome** — Brave blocks the bolt WebSocket.

reports.title: Total Wallets
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet) RETURN count(w) AS Total

reports.title: Pump.fun Seeds
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet {source:"pump_seed"}) RETURN count(w) AS Total

reports.title: Discovered
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet {source:"discovered"}) RETURN count(w) AS Total

reports.title: Total Transfers
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN count(t) AS Total

reports.title: Total SOL Volume
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN round(sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9*1000)/1000 AS SOL

reports.title: Avg Transfer Size
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN round(avg(t.amount_lamports)/1e9*1000)/1000 AS SOL

reports.title: Active Wallets (7d)
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]-() WHERE t.block_time >= timestamp()/1000 - 7*86400 RETURN count(DISTINCT w) AS Wallets

reports.title: Data Freshness
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN toString(date(datetime({epochSeconds: max(t.block_time)}))) AS Latest

reports.title: Transfers Per Day (last 30d)
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() WITH date(datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time})) AS day, count(*) AS n WHERE day >= date() - duration({days: 30}) RETURN day AS Date, n AS Transfers ORDER BY day

reports.title: Wallets by Source
reports.query: MATCH (w:Wallet) RETURN w.source AS Source, count(w) AS Count ORDER BY Count DESC

## Identity Hubs
Wallets bridging ≥ 2 confirmed pump.fun traders via off-exchange SOL transfers. The table ranks hubs by seed-wallet count; select one to inspect its neighborhood and balance flow.

reports.title: Third-Party Wallets Bridging Multiple Pump.fun Accounts
reports.query: MATCH (h:Wallet {source:"discovered"})-[t:TRANSFER]-(s:Wallet {source:"pump_seed"}) WITH DISTINCT h, t, s WITH h, count(DISTINCT s) AS seeds, count(DISTINCT t) AS txs, round(sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9*1000)/1000 AS sol WHERE seeds >= 2 RETURN h.address AS Hub, seeds AS SeedCount, txs AS Transfers, sol AS SOL ORDER BY seeds DESC, sol DESC LIMIT 100

reports.title: Select Hub
reports.query: MATCH (h:Wallet {source:"discovered"})-[:TRANSFER]-(s:Wallet {source:"pump_seed"}) WITH h, count(DISTINCT s) AS n WHERE n >= 2 RETURN h.address AS value ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 100

settings.helperText: Pick a wallet bridging multiple pump.fun accounts

reports.title: Net SOL Flow (+ = inflow)
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (h:Wallet {address:$neodash_hub}) CALL { WITH h OPTIONAL MATCH (h)<-[ti:TRANSFER]-() RETURN coalesce(sum(ti.amount_lamports),0) AS inbound } CALL { WITH h OPTIONAL MATCH (h)-[to:TRANSFER]->() RETURN coalesce(sum(to.amount_lamports),0) AS outbound } RETURN coalesce(round((inbound-outbound)/1e9*1000)/1000, 0) AS NetSOL

reports.title: Transfers
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (h:Wallet {address:$neodash_hub})-[t:TRANSFER]-() RETURN coalesce(count(t), 0) AS Transfers

reports.title: Counterparties
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (h:Wallet {address:$neodash_hub})-[:TRANSFER]-(c) RETURN coalesce(count(DISTINCT c), 0) AS Counterparties

reports.title: SOL Touched
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (h:Wallet {address:$neodash_hub})-[t:TRANSFER]-() RETURN coalesce(round(sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9*1000)/1000, 0) AS SOL

reports.title: Hub Neighborhood
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (h:Wallet {address:$neodash_hub}) WITH h WHERE h IS NOT NULL MATCH (h)-[t:TRANSFER]-(s:Wallet) RETURN h, t, s LIMIT 150

settings.noDataMessage: Pick a hub above to render its 1-hop neighborhood.

reports.query:
## Wallet Inspector
Paste any Solana wallet address below to explore its type, 2-hop neighborhood, top counterparties, and recent transfer history.

reports.title: Type
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet}) RETURN coalesce(w.source, '— pick a wallet —') AS Type

reports.title: First Seen
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet}) RETURN coalesce(toString(w.first_seen_at), '—') AS FirstSeen

reports.title: Transfers
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet})-[t:TRANSFER]-() RETURN coalesce(count(t), 0) AS Transfers

reports.title: 2-Hop Neighborhood
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet}) WITH w WHERE w IS NOT NULL MATCH p = (w)-[:TRANSFER*1..2]-(n:Wallet) RETURN p LIMIT 100

settings.noDataMessage: Paste a wallet address above to inspect its 2-hop neighborhood.

reports.title: Top Counterparties
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (w:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet}) WITH w WHERE w IS NOT NULL MATCH (w)-[t:TRANSFER]-(c:Wallet) WITH c, sum(CASE WHEN startNode(t)=w THEN t.amount_lamports ELSE 0 END)/1e9 AS sol_out, sum(CASE WHEN endNode(t)=w THEN t.amount_lamports ELSE 0 END)/1e9 AS sol_in, count(t) AS txs RETURN c.address AS Wallet, c.source AS Type, txs AS Transfers, round(sol_in*1000)/1000 AS SOLIn, round(sol_out*1000)/1000 AS SOLOut, round((sol_in-sol_out)*1000)/1000 AS NetSOL ORDER BY txs DESC LIMIT 50

settings.noDataMessage: Paste a wallet address above to see its counterparties.

reports.title: Recent Transfers
reports.query: OPTIONAL MATCH (a:Wallet {address:$neodash_wallet}) WITH a WHERE a IS NOT NULL MATCH (a)-[t:TRANSFER]-(b:Wallet) WITH a, t, b, CASE WHEN startNode(t)=a THEN "OUT" ELSE "IN" END AS direction ORDER BY t.block_time DESC LIMIT 50 RETURN datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}) AS Time, direction AS Dir, round(t.amount_lamports/1e9*1000)/1000 AS SOL, b.address AS Counterparty, b.source AS Type, t.signature AS Signature

settings.noDataMessage: Paste a wallet address above to see recent transfers.

reports.query:
## Money Flow
Top wallet pairs by total SOL volume, the single largest individual transfers, and a sankey diagram of dominant flows.

reports.title: Top Wallet Pairs by Volume
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) WITH a, b, sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9 AS sol, count(t) AS txs ORDER BY sol DESC LIMIT 50 RETURN a.address AS From, a.source AS FromType, b.address AS To, b.source AS ToType, txs AS Transfers, round(sol*1000)/1000 AS SOL

reports.title: Biggest Single Transfers
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) RETURN a.address AS From, b.address AS To, round(t.amount_lamports/1e9*1000)/1000 AS SOL, datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}) AS Time, t.signature AS Signature ORDER BY t.amount_lamports DESC LIMIT 50

reports.title: SOL Flow (Top Pairs)
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) WITH a, b, sum(t.amount_lamports)/1e9 AS sol ORDER BY sol DESC LIMIT 15 RETURN a.address AS from, b.address AS to, sol AS value

## Time Patterns
Daily transfer counts by wallet-pair type over the last 60 days, plus hourly (UTC) and day-of-week distributions.

reports.title: Transfers Per Day by Wallet Pair Type (last 60d)
reports.query: MATCH (a:Wallet)-[t:TRANSFER]->(b:Wallet) WITH date(datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time})) AS day, CASE WHEN a.source="pump_seed" AND b.source="pump_seed" THEN "seed→seed" WHEN a.source="discovered" AND b.source="discovered" THEN "disc→disc" ELSE "seed↔disc" END AS kind, count(*) AS n WHERE day >= date() - duration({days: 60}) WITH day, sum(CASE WHEN kind="seed→seed" THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS SeedToSeed, sum(CASE WHEN kind="disc→disc" THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS DiscToDisc, sum(CASE WHEN kind="seed↔disc" THEN n ELSE 0 END) AS SeedToDisc RETURN day AS Date, SeedToSeed, DiscToDisc, SeedToDisc ORDER BY day

reports.title: Transfers by Hour of Day (UTC)
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() RETURN datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}).hour AS Hour, count(*) AS Transfers ORDER BY Hour

reports.title: Transfers by Day of Week
reports.query: MATCH ()-[t:TRANSFER]->() WITH datetime({epochSeconds: t.block_time}).dayOfWeek AS dow WITH dow, count(*) AS Transfers RETURN CASE dow WHEN 1 THEN "Mon" WHEN 2 THEN "Tue" WHEN 3 THEN "Wed" WHEN 4 THEN "Thu" WHEN 5 THEN "Fri" WHEN 6 THEN "Sat" WHEN 7 THEN "Sun" END AS Day, Transfers ORDER BY dow
